---
title: "Kah Seng LIAN"
image: assets/profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/liankahseng/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/sunroofgod/
---

Penultimate undergraduate pursuing B.Sc in Data Science & Analytics (Minor in Computer Science and Theatre Studies) at NUS. My interests lie in Software Design & Architecture, Data Science and Cats.

## Education

National University of Singapore | Singapore, Singapore
B.Sc in Data Science & Analytics | August 2019 - Present

## Experience

Duke-NUS | Software Engineer | May 2023 - present
